Upstream repository: https://github.com/MiniMax-AI/skills

Vendored date: 2026-03-28

Vendored subset:

- `skills/frontend-dev`
- `skills/fullstack-dev`

Local policy:

- These skills are bundled as application-owned assets.
- They are not installed into user-global skill directories.
- The app orchestrator selects and injects them explicitly.
- Local project rules, `PLAN.md`, `PLAN_BLACKBOARD.md`, and `BLACKBOARD.md` always take precedence.
